Id: IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFever

Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-03-25 23:30:34+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.Yellow fever IMMZ.D2.DT.Yellow fever
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

Libraries:
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Actions:
Determine if the client is due for Yellow fever.: Determine if the client is due for Yellow fever vaccine according to the national immunization protocol.
If: Applicability: Client is due for yellow fever vaccination (Client is due for yellow fever vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE23', display: 'Yellow fever vaccines' } }, display: 'Yellow fever vaccines' })
Check for Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Yellow fever.: Show Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Yellow fever.
If: Applicability: Has Guidance (Has Guidance)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

extension.valueString: IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZEncounterElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverEncounterElements
Yellow fever Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: Yellow fever containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "Yellow fever Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Yellow fever vaccines"
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverEncounterElements
Yellow fever Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverEncounterElements
Number of Yellow fever Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverEncounterElements
No yellow fever primary series doses were administered
IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Months

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in months
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Months":
  AgeInMonthsAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverEncounterElements
Client's age is less than 9 months
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverEncounterElements
Client's age is more than or equal to 9 months

Live Attenuated Vaccines

Live Attenuated Vaccines

IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination Guidance

No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks

IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Client is due for yellow fever vaccination
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Client is due for yellow fever vaccination Guidance
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverEncounterElements
One yellow fever primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Yellow fever immunization schedule is complete
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Yellow fever immunization schedule is complete Guidance
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination" then "Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is due for yellow fever vaccination" then "Client is due for yellow fever vaccination Guidance"
    when "Yellow fever immunization schedule is complete" then "Yellow fever immunization schedule is complete Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )

parameter.name: Client is due for yellow fever vaccination

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

extension.valueMarkdown:
In endemic countries, it is recommended that yellow fever vaccine be given to children aged 
9–12 months at the same time as the measles vaccine. Preventive mass vaccination campaigns are recommended 
for inhabitants of areas at risk of yellow fever where there is low vaccination coverage.
Vaccination should be provided to everyone aged 9 months and older in any area with reported cases.
Vaccination should also be offered if the individual is travelling to and from at-risk areas, if not contraindicated.
As a general rule, any live vaccine may be given either simultaneously or at an interval of 4 weeks. Oral 
poliovirus vaccine may be given at any time in relation to yellow fever vaccination.
